license_strategy: Original clinical synthesis supported by official government/public-domain-or-copyright-free sources where applicable. No proprietary medical manual text copied. Final legal review required before production embeddings.

excluded_sources.title: MedlinePlus / A.D.A.M. Medical Encyclopedia pages
excluded_sources.reason: Known restrictions against automated extraction / AI dataset / RAG embedding use without express written consent.

excluded_sources.title: Commercial medical sites and proprietary manuals
excluded_sources.reason: Potential copyright/licensing restrictions; not used as source text.

ORIGINAL-ADULT-GM-001.title: Original adult general medicine clinical-reasoning synthesis
ORIGINAL-ADULT-GM-001.license_notes: Original authored synthesis; not copied from proprietary medical manuals. Requires physician review.
ORIGINAL-ADULT-GM-001.used_for: Adult general medicine reasoning, safe boundaries, question sets, handoff structure.

CDC-MAT-001.title: CDC - Use of Agency Materials
CDC-MAT-001.license_notes: Most CDC information is public domain with attribution and non-endorsement requirements; exceptions exist.

CDC-STROKE-001.license_notes: Official .gov source; final legal review required.
CDC-STROKE-001.used_for: Stroke/TIA warning symptoms and urgent escalation.
